dd-auth-001.question: Should auth state be a singleton or entity collection?
dd-auth-001.decision: Singleton AuthState with embedded user/session value objects
dd-auth-001.rationale: Only one current auth state exists. Supabase is source of truth for users. MST store tracks current session only, not user database.

dd-auth-002.question: Should tokens be stored in MST state?
dd-auth-002.decision: Yes, store accessToken, refreshToken, expiresAt in AuthSession
dd-auth-002.rationale: Enables computed properties (isExpired) and allows React components to react to token changes. Tokens are already in browser memory via Supabase client.

dd-auth-003.question: How to make auth provider swappable?
dd-auth-003.decision: AuthService interface injected via MST environment
dd-auth-003.rationale: Follows existing environment pattern in state-api. Allows SupabaseAuthProvider, MockAuthProvider, or future providers without changing store code.
